team.name: Coordinator
team.roleDesc: Orchestrates tasks across the fleet, maintains shared memory, and ensures all agents stay aligned with project goals.

team.name: Builder
team.roleDesc: Implements features, manages CI/CD, and maintains the technical foundation of the fleet.

team.name: Analyst
team.roleDesc: Monitors metrics, surfaces trends, and generates reports to guide fleet decisions.

projects.title: Fleet Hub
projects.summary: Centralized management dashboard for the multi-agent crew.
